---
name: Feature Request / Change
about: Request a new feature, improvement, or change to how something works
title: "[REQUEST] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like added or changed?
<!-- Be specific about what you want it to do -->


## Why is this needed?
<!-- What problem does it solve? Who benefits? -->


## Where in the app would this live?
<!-- e.g., Rep dashboard, Admin > Leaderboard tab, engagement form -->


## Any examples or mockups?
<!-- Screenshots, sketches, or descriptions of how you'd want it to look/work -->
